expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs link command (not jira.mjs create) for document-based creation
expectations.evidence: Step 4: 'node .../sync.mjs link _bmad-output/user-story-2.md --type story --project DO --create' and 'Used sync.mjs link --create instead of raw jira.mjs create'

Uses DO project as instructed (original assertion referenced placeholder project name). Uses --project DO instead of --project OMPBLINK. The command is 'sync.mjs link _bmad-output/user-story-2.md --type story --project DO --create'

expectations.text: Checks for field mapping file (memory/jira-story-field-mapping.json) before creating
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'ls .../memory/jira-story-field-mapping.json' with conditional logic 'If mapping file does NOT exist' vs 'If mapping file DOES exist'

expectations.text: If no mapping exists, runs sync.mjs setup-mapping or proceeds with defaults
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'If mapping file does NOT exist: Need to create one first... node .../sync.mjs setup-mapping --type story --sample DO-<NUMBER>'

expectations.text: The source document is updated with jira_ticket_id in frontmatter or [KEY] prefix in title
expectations.evidence: 'Update the source document... with the Jira link: If document has YAML frontmatter: adds jira_ticket_id: DO-XXX to frontmatter. If no frontmatter: prefixes title with [DO-XXX]'

expectations.text: A sync state file is created in memory/sync-state/
If mapping has non-empty instructions field, prints them to stdout
expectations.evidence: 'Print any instructions from the field mapping config for the agent to follow'
